title: LLM Prompt Injection
description: Adversary crafts inputs to alter LLM behaviour. Direct (user prompt) or indirect (via retrieved content).

title: Erode ML Model Integrity
description: Adversary degrades model integrity through repeated adversarial inputs or training poisoning.

title: Craft Adversarial Data
description: Adversary creates inputs designed to fool the ML model — perturbations, evasion samples.

title: Exploit Public-Facing Application
description: Adversary exploits a public-facing ML-powered app to gain access or move laterally.

title: LLM Plugin Compromise
description: Adversary compromises an LLM plugin / tool to gain agent execution.

title: LLM Jailbreak
description: Adversary bypasses safety guardrails to elicit prohibited model behaviour.

title: ML Model Inference API Access
description: Adversary probes the inference API to characterise the model.

title: Full ML Model Access
description: Adversary obtains full model weights — enables offline analysis and adversarial sample generation.

title: Exfiltration via ML Inference API
description: Adversary extracts training data, system prompt, or proprietary data through carefully crafted queries.

title: LLM Data Leakage
description: Adversary extracts confidential data the model was given in its context window.
